code.comment: Define the request and response parameters for this API endpoint

request.schema: [{"of":"string","hint":"This endpoint returns a resource which excludes some properties by default. To include those optional properties, set this query parameter to a comma-separated list of the properties you wish to include.","name":"opt_fields","type":"array","label":"Opt fields","optional":true,"control_type":"object"}]

responses.body_schema: [{"of":"object","name":"data","type":"array","label":"Data","properties":[{"hint":"Globally unique identifier of the resource, as a string.","name":"gid","type":"string","label":"Gid","example":"12345","readOnly":true,"control_type":"text","x_insert_after":false},{"hint":"The base type of this resource.","name":"resource_type","type":"string","label":"Resource type","example":"task","readOnly":true,"control_type":"text","x_insert_after":"gid"},{"hint":"The name of the task.","name":"name","type":"string","label":"Name","example":"Bug Task","control_type":"text"},{"hint":"The subtype of this resource. Different subtypes retain many of the same fields and behavior, but may render differently in Asana or represent resources with different semantic meaning.\nThe resource_subtype `milestone` represent a single moment in time. This means tasks with this subtype cannot have a start_date.","name":"resource_subtype","type":"string","label":"Resource subtype","example":"default_task","pick_list":[["default_task","default_task"],["milestone","milestone"],["approval","approval"]],"toggle_hint":"Select value","control_type":"select","toggle_field":{"name":"resource_subtype","type":"string","label":"Resource_subtype","toggle_hint":"Enter manual value","control_type":"text","toggle_to_primary_hint":"Select value","toggle_to_secondary_hint":"Enter manual value"},"extends_schema":true},{"hint":"[Opt In](/docs/inputoutput-options). A *user* object represents an account in Asana that can be given access to various workspaces, projects, and tasks.","name":"created_by","type":"object","label":"Created by","readOnly":true,"properties":[{"hint":"Globally unique identifier of the resource.","name":"gid","type":"string","label":"Gid","example":"1111","control_type":"text"},{"hint":"The type of resource.","name":"resource_type","type":"string","label":"Resource type","example":"user","control_type":"text"}]}]}]

properties.label: Opt fields
properties.hint: This endpoint returns a resource which excludes some properties by default. To include those optional properties, set this query parameter to a comma-separated list of the properties you wish to include.
properties.name: opt_fields

properties.label: Gid
properties.hint: Globally unique identifier of the resource, as a string.
properties.name: gid

properties.label: Resource type
properties.hint: The base type of this resource.
properties.name: resource_type

properties.label: Resource subtype
properties.hint:
The subtype of this resource. Different subtypes retain many of the same fields and behavior, but may render differently in Asana or represent resources with different semantic meaning.
The resource_subtype `milestone` represent a single moment in time. This means tasks with this subtype cannot have a start_date.
properties.name: resource_subtype

properties.label: Gid
properties.hint: Globally unique identifier of the resource.
properties.name: gid

properties.label: Created by
properties.hint: [Opt In](/docs/inputoutput-options). A *user* object represents an account in Asana that can be given access to various workspaces, projects, and tasks.
properties.name: created_by
